What are PVA Facebook accounts?

What types of content can be displayed on Facebook?

Photos, videos, texts, and voice are allowed to be displayed on Facebook. But the contents should not be harmful, violence creating, child abusing, in one word, contents which are not against the community standards are allowed to be shared.
